subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Divine Kingdom! In this mighty Cycle and wondrous Age, when the face of the world is in freshness and verdure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت الهی در این کور عظیم و قرن بدیع که روی جهان در لطافت و طراوت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God
